title: senecio schinzianus
intro: Senecio schinzianus, also known as Schinz's ragwort or Schinz's groundsel, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to southern Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and flatulence. The health benefits of Senecio schinzianus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against oxidative stress. Senecio schinzianus can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders.
